name: doc-detective
description: Documentation testing and validation using Doc Detective. Test documentation procedures, convert docs to executable test specs, and validate that documented workflows match actual application behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Documentation testing and workflow validation tools.
interface.longDescription: Test documentation procedures, convert docs to executable test specs, and validate that documented workflows match actual application behavior. Includes skills for initializing projects, generating tests, running tests, injecting inline tests, and installing CI workflows.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Doc Detective in this project.
Run Doc Detective tests on my docs.
